journey.name: Dashboard Empty State
journey.description: Verify the dashboard shows correct elements when no meals are tracked. iOS parity: DashboardTests.testEmptyStateShowsCorrectText, testHeroCardAccessibilityElements

actions.action: Verify the screen title "Watch My Calories" is displayed at the top
Verify the current date is displayed below the title
Verify a settings gear icon is visible in the top-right corner
Verify the hero card shows "0" kcal consumed
Verify the hero card shows "Goal" with value "1940"
Verify the hero card shows "Remaining" with value "1940"
Verify the text "No meals tracked yet" is displayed
Verify the text "Tap to scan your first meal." is displayed
Verify the text "or log manually" link is displayed
Verify the bottom tab bar shows 4 tabs: Dashboard, Log Food, Scan Menu, History
Verify the Dashboard tab is currently selected
